_comment: THE TOUCHLINE config (canon, committed). Sensing is not interrupting: this organ never pings; it acts only through files. The MIXED-ZONE EAR is exiled by constitution — touchline.mjs hardcodes {enabled:false, surface:'scrimmage_only'} and ignores any attempt to enable it here; FORGE-Bolo remains unmeasured ground, forever. Thresholds are v0 hypotheses (tunable at R1, lossless re-run).
